rationale: Educ. Code §7.103 governs board member eligibility (residency, age, lobbying). It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A person is not eligible for election to or service on the board if the person holds an office with this state or any political subdivision of this state.
_note: Rule text concerns board membership eligibility; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
